title: Honorable Mention in Nusantara Student Olimpiad
role: Peraih Medali Honorable - Bidang Bahasa Arab
description: Awarded Honorable Mention in the national-level Nusantara Student Olimpiad 2022 for the Arabic Language category.

title: Silver Medalist in Indonesian Science Competition (ISC)
description: Achieved a Silver Medal (Predikat A) in the national-level science competition for Earth Science (Kebumian) organized by Yayasan Berlian Hati Mulia.

title: School Network Design with Access Security System and IoT Integration
description: Designed a school network architecture simulation using Cisco Packet Tracer, implementing access control security systems and integrating smart IoT devices.

title: Stair-Climbing Robot Project
description: Developed a specialized wheeled/legged robot engineered to navigate, self-balance, and mechanically climb stair steps.

title: Water Level System with PID Control
description: Implemented a PID control algorithm to regulate water flow rates and automatically maintain precise water level stability inside a tank system.

title: Miniature Automatic Plant Watering System
description: Developed a miniature automated plant irrigation system powered by an ATmega328P microcontroller, utilizing temperature and soil moisture sensors to regulate smart watering intervals.
